text.style: font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 48px; font-weight: bold; fill: #FFFFFF;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; fill: #B4B4B4;

svg.text: Agent Loop 是 Agent 的"心跳" — 一个持续运行的感知-思考-行动循环

text.style: font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; fill: #00F5D4;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #B4B4B4;

svg.text: 收集输入: 用户指令 + 工具结果 + 环境信息

text.style: font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 28px; fill: #FFFFFF; fill-opacity: 0.4;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; fill: #7B61FF;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #B4B4B4;

svg.text: LLM 推理: 分析现状 → 制定计划 → 决定下一步行动

text.style: font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 28px; fill: #FFFFFF; fill-opacity: 0.4;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; fill: #FF6B6B;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #B4B4B4;

svg.text: 执行操作: Function Calling → 工具执行 → 获取结果

text.style: font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 28px; fill: #FFFFFF; fill-opacity: 0.4;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; fill: #00F5D4;
font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #B4B4B4;

svg.text: 否 → 回到感知步骤，携带新结果继续循环
